header_info.title: Global Nuclear Power Tracker - September 4, 2025
header_info.citation: Recommended Citation: "Global Energy Monitor, Global Nuclear Power Tracker, September 2025 release" (See the CC license for attribution requirements if sharing or adapting the data set.)
header_info.contact: Contact: Joe Bernardi, Project Manager, Global Hydro and Nuclear Trackers, Global Energy Monitor - joe.bernardi@globalenergymonitor.org

entries.name: announced
entries.definition: The unit has been described in corporate or government plans but concrete steps such as applying for permits have not yet been taken.

entries.name: pre-construction
entries.definition: The unit is actively moving forward in seeking governmental approvals, land rights, or financing.

entries.name: construction
entries.definition: The unit has site preparation and equipment installation underway.

entries.name: operating
entries.definition: The unit has been formally commissioned; commercial operation has begun.

entries.name: shelved
entries.definition: Unit suspension has been announced.

entries.name: shelved - inferred 2 y
entries.definition: The unit is inferred to be shelved because no progress has been observed for at least two years.

entries.name: cancelled
entries.definition: A cancellation announcement for the unit has been made.

entries.name: cancelled - inferred 4 y
entries.definition: The unit is inferred to be cancelled because no progress has been observed for at least four years.

entries.name: mothballed
entries.definition: The unit is disused, but not dismantled.

entries.name: retired
entries.definition: The unit has been decommissioned.

entries.name: Date Last Researched
entries.definition: Date that this unit was last researched by the researcher

entries.name: Country/Area
entries.definition: Country/area where the project is located (unabbreviated)

entries.name: Project Name
entries.definition: Commonly used name
entries.notes: Preference is for a government provided name. Without that information, the name used by the owner or operating company is listed

entries.name: Unit Name
entries.definition: Common name of the unit
entries.notes: Roman numerals are changed to numbers. If the owner uses non-sequential numbers or other characters, those are used

entries.name: Project Name in Local Language / Script
entries.definition: Commonly used name in the locally used script
entries.notes: Left blank for local languages that use the Roman/Latin alphabet. Otherwise local name(s) in local script provided if possible

entries.name: Other Name(s)
entries.definition: Alternative names, including the name in local script

entries.name: Capacity (MW)
entries.definition: Nameplate capacity, or best available data, of the unit in megawatts

entries.name: Status
entries.definition: see rows 14-23 above

entries.name: Reactor Type
entries.definition: Classification of power reactors by coolant and moderator material

entries.name: Model
entries.definition: Specific design series of the reactor

entries.name: Start Year
entries.definition: Year the unit is commissioned

entries.name: Retirement Year
entries.definition: Year the unit is taken offline

entries.name: Planned Retirement
entries.definition: Indicates if the Retirement Year is planned or actual

entries.name: Cancellation Year
entries.definition: Year the unit is cancelled

entries.name: Construction Start Date
entries.definition: Date that unit construction begins

entries.name: First Criticality Date
entries.definition: Date that the unit first achieves criticality

entries.name: First Grid Connection
entries.definition: Date that the unit first connects to the grid

entries.name: Commercial Operation Date
entries.definition: Date that the unit begins commercial operation

entries.name: Retirement Date
entries.definition: Date that the unit is retired

entries.name: Owner
entries.definition: The company(ies) that directly own(s) the unit
entries.notes: If percent ownership is known format is CompanyA [X%]; CompanyB [Y%]

entries.name: Owner Name in Local Language / Script
entries.definition: Company name(s) of owner(s) in the locally used script
entries.notes: Left blank for local languages that use the Roman/Latin alphabet. Otherwise owner name(s) in local script included if possible

entries.name: Operator
entries.definition: The company(ies) that operates the unit
entries.notes: Company that performs day-to-day operations and maintenance of the unit

entries.name: Operator Name in Local Language / Script
entries.definition: Company name(s) of operator(s) in the locally used script
entries.notes: Left blank for local languages that use the Roman/Latin alphabet. Otherwise operator name(s) in local script included if possible

entries.name: Reference Net Capacity (MW)
entries.definition: Net capacity of the unit for the reference period

entries.name: Design Net Capacity (MW)
entries.definition: Net capacity of the unit as originally designed by the manufacturer

entries.name: Thermal Capacity (MWt)
entries.definition: Net capacity for heat transferred from nuclear fuel to coolant

entries.name: Latitude
entries.definition: Latitude, assumed WGS84 (google maps)

entries.name: Longitude
entries.definition: Latitude, assumed WGS84 (google maps)

entries.name: Location Accuracy
entries.definition: Location is Approximate based by using nearest city or other information in research, or Location is Exact based on visibility on map or given in research

entries.name: City
entries.definition: City, town, or village where unit is located

entries.name: Local Area (taluk, county)
entries.definition: County/taluk where unit is located

entries.name: Major Area (prefecture, district)
entries.definition: Prefecture or district where unit is located

entries.name: State/Province
entries.definition: Subnational unit where unit is located

entries.name: Subregion
entries.definition: Subregion (using UN Population and Statistics definitions) where unit is located

entries.name: Region
entries.definition: Region (using UN Population and Statistics definitions) where unit is located

entries.name: GEM location ID
entries.definition: GEM-generated ID unique for each project
entries.notes: Units: L100000500001 - L100000599999 for nuclear projects.

entries.name: GEM unit ID
entries.definition: GEM-generated ID unique for each unit
entries.notes: Units: G100000500001 - G100000599999 for nuclear units.

entries.name: Wiki URL
entries.definition: URL of corresponding GEM.wiki pages
